story.text: Abdelhamid Bakhta's high-assurance paper (StarkWare, April 2026) names a single cross-cutting weakness in AI safety: **the integrity gap** — the structural distance between what a deployer *claims* about an AI system's behavior and what an outside party can *independently verify*. The paper's load-bearing move is to call that gap **architectural rather than procedural**:…
*A V6 working research note. Full text: `agentprivacy-docs/research/pvm-v6-bakhta-integrity-gap-convergence.md`.*
